visits.note: Patient P033 presents with new-onset Type 2 Diabetes. Blood pressure is elevated at 140/90. Patient reports fatigue and polyuria. Plan to initiate Metformin 500mg BID and Lisinopril 10mg daily.

Patient P033 returns for follow-up. HbA1c has decreased to 7.2 but blood pressure remains elevated at 148/92. Patient reports worsening fatigue and recent onset of lower extremity edema. Plan to adjust Metformin to 850mg BID and increase Lisinopril to 20mg daily.

Patient P033 returns for follow-up. HbA1c has increased to 7.8 and blood pressure has improved to 134/82. Patient reports resolution of lower extremity edema but new onset of dyspnea on exertion. Plan to initiate Atorvastatin 20mg daily for Hyperlipidemia and increase Metformin to 1000mg BID.

Patient P033 returns for follow-up. HbA1c has decreased to 7.0 and blood pressure has improved to 128/76. Patient reports worsening dyspnea on exertion and recent onset of orthopnea. Plan to increase Lisinopril to 40mg daily and initiate Furosemide 20mg daily for heart failure.

Patient P033 returns for follow-up. HbA1c has increased to 7.5 and blood pressure has worsened to 152/94. Patient reports worsening orthopnea and recent onset of chest pain. Plan to adjust medications and consider referral to cardiology.
